quote: Kythera has become my anchor. Every Thursday, I know I'll find a space to just... be. The music, the people, the energy - it's unlike anything else in Jaipur.
name: Priya Sharma

quote: I came for the music but stayed for the community. These people are now my family.
name: Rah Verma

quote: As someone who'd never played music before, I was terrified. But Kythera showed me that everyone has music inside them. You just need a safe space to let it out.
name: Anita Gupta
